name: migration-to-aws
description: Migrate from GCP, Heroku, or fly.io to AWS — including your entire AI stack. Moves infrastructure (Cloud Run → Fargate, Heroku Dynos → Fargate, Fly Machines → Fargate/Lambda MicroVMs, databases → RDS/Aurora, Tigris → S3), OpenAI/Gemini workloads to Amazon Bedrock, and agentic systems (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK) to AWS-native frameworks. Handles fly.io GPU sunset migration (2026-08-01). Generates runnable Terraform, migration scripts, provider adapters, and deployment artifacts. Gives honest model-by-model pricing comparisons so you know exactly when Bedrock saves money and when it doesn’t.
